collection_methodology.source_download: Dataset manually downloaded from NASA public repository
collection_methodology.cloud_upload: Uploaded to AWS S3 raw data zone using boto3
collection_methodology.future_processing: Processed structured outputs can later be written to AWS RDS PostgreSQL for downstream analytics, modeling, and dashboard access

cloud_architecture.compute: AWS EC2 for ETL and preprocessing
cloud_architecture.database: AWS RDS PostgreSQL for processed data

schema.target_variable_note: Remaining Useful Life (RUL) is derived later during preprocessing, not stored directly in the raw FD003 training file
